meta.title: Dr. Jorge Arce — Oral Surgery, Made Human · v18 MindMarket
meta.description: One case, one surgeon. Dr. Jorge Arce leads implants, reconstruction, and long-term care from a single South Bay practice.

sections.title: One case. One surgeon.
sections.sub: You come once and we take it from there. From planning and surgery to restoration and long-term care, everything is led by a single board-certified surgeon who carries your case from start to finish — with clear updates and honest answers.

moments.title: First, we listen.
moments.body: A long, unhurried consultation. Your history, your scans, your questions — and an honest read of what is possible, in plain language.

moments.title: Then, we plan the whole case.
moments.body: Every case is mapped before anyone operates — implants, grafting, sequencing, restoration. The time the case actually needs, not the time the schedule allows.
pts: A report your dentist can act on

moments.title: Then, life gets better.
moments.body: Surgery with steady hands, restoration that looks structural and natural, and long-term maintenance that protects the work — eating, smiling, and speaking again.

sections.head: A few numbers behind the care we deliver

items.l: years devoted to oral & maxillofacial surgery
the year the Dental Implants Center of South Bay opened
surgical disciplines refined across a career

cards.q: “I had been told by two surgeons it was impossible. Dr. Arce took the time no one else did. I can eat, smile, and speak again.”
“When a case is beyond what I can handle, Jorge is the first call I make. My patients always come back grateful — and so do I.”
“The most thorough and honest surgeon I have ever met. He treated my father like family.”
“Calm, precise, and genuinely kind. He explained every step until I understood. The result speaks for itself.”
“I refer my most complex cases to Dr. Arce without hesitation. Twenty-seven years shows.”
“I was terrified of the procedure. He never rushed me. Best decision I have made for my health.”
“Years of pain, gone. I only wish I had found him sooner. I recommend Dr. Arce to everyone I know.”
“Reliable, communicative, and surgically excellent. He sends my patients back with a full report every time.”
“The level of care and follow-up is rare. My patients trust him, and that trust reflects back on my practice.”

sections.title: Told it couldn't be done? Let's talk.
sections.sub: Request a consultation or get the free guide — What to expect from your first implant consultation.
